services.title: Auto Locksmith Services
services.summary: Expert auto locksmithing, vehicle entry, and transponder key programming across Cardiff.
services.htmlContent:
Rapid Auto Locksmithing in Cardiff

Losing your car keys, locking them inside the vehicle, or breaking a key in the ignition can ruin your entire day.

Our specialist auto locksmith team provides emergency roadside assistance to get you back behind the wheel quickly and safely across Cardiff.

Damage-Free Vehicle Entry

Using specialized Lishi decoders and varying techniques, we can pick the door locks of 95%+ of modern cars, vans, and trucks.

We do this without leaving a single scratch on the paintwork or damaging the door seals.

We entirely bypass the costly and damaging "wedge and rod" methods used by some recovery services.

Key Replacement & Programming

Modern vehicle keys are complex transponders that communicate with your car's immobilizer.

If you have lost all your keys, we can:

  • Decode your door lock to cut a physical emergency blade
  • Connect to the vehicle's OBD port to extract the necessary PIN codes
  • Program a brand new transponder fob to your vehicle and delete the old lost keys from the ECU

All of this is done on the side of the road.

This saves you the exorbitant cost and hassle of towing your car to the main dealer.


Need immediate roadside help?

Get an auto expert on the way.

services.title: Module Coding & Cloning
services.summary: Advanced auto vehicle module coding, ECU programming, and unit cloning services.
services.htmlContent:
Specialist Vehicle Module Coding & Cloning in Cardiff

Modern vehicles rely heavily on complex electronic modules to control everything from the engine to the central locking.

When these modules fail, replacing them often requires advanced programming and coding to ensure they communicate correctly with the rest of the vehicle's systems.

ECU & Module Cloning

If your engine control unit (ECU) or another vital module has suffered water damage or electronic failure, we can often clone the original data.

We extract the software and immobilizer data from your broken module and write it precisely onto a replacement unit.

This means the new module is entirely plug-and-play, saving you the massive expense of a main dealer replacement and coding session.

Advanced Programming

  • New Module Adaptation: Coding brand new virgin modules to your specific vehicle's VIN and immobilizer system.
  • Immobilizer Defeat / Virginising: Resetting used modules so they can be adapted to a different vehicle.
  • Feature Activation: Unlocking hidden features or adjusting parameters within the vehicle's software.

For expert module coding and cloning across Cardiff, rely on Ed Jones Mobile Locksmith.


Contact us today with your vehicle details.

services.title: Vehicle Key Remapping
services.summary: Professional key remapping and immobilizer programming for improved vehicle security.
services.htmlContent:
Professional Vehicle Key Remapping in Cardiff

Ensure your vehicle is secure with our custom key remapping and immobilizer services across Cardiff.

If you've bought a second-hand vehicle or lost a set of keys, it's crucial to ensure that old keys cannot be used to start your car.

We can adjust the software on your vehicle's immobilizer to erase old keys and map new ones to your system.

Key Programming & Remapping

Our key remapping service safely synchronizes your new transponder keys with your vehicle's ECU.

You will experience seamless entry and starting, with the complete peace of mind that no unauthorized keys will work.

This is the most critical upgrade for drivers looking to secure a newly purchased used vehicle.

Immobilizer Solutions

  • Lost Key Deletion: We securely erase any lost or stolen keys from your vehicle's memory.
  • New Module Synchronization: If your immobilizer module has been replaced, we can remap it to communicate with the rest of your vehicle.
  • Cost Savings: Our mobile key remapping service provides a dealership-level solution at a fraction of the cost, right at your doorstep.

We provide fully mobile vehicle security and key remapping services across Cardiff.


Get a quote to remap your vehicle keys.

testimonials.name: Sean Brain
testimonials.quote: Fantastic service. Called on a Saturday at 8:30am and ed arrived within the hour. Had my keys out of the car in under 10 minutes. Friendly, quick, and far cheaper than the other quotes I had. Highly recommended. Many thanks

testimonials.name: Ewan Blunt
testimonials.quote: quality service, got the job done straight away for a good price. Definitely Recommend.

testimonials.name: James Davies
testimonials.quote: What a fantastic service . Called out after someone attempted to steel my car. Arrived within 30 minutes and was able to restore my keys to the car so that I could Move it and secure the car. Very professional and amazing service would highly recommend.

testimonials.name: amy p
testimonials.quote: Brilliant service from Ed. He diverted from going home at the end of his day to help us when we were stuck, 2 recovery services tried and failed but Ed was able to get us moving again. I would 100% recommend Ed, his prices are very reasonable! Thank you again Ed!!

blogPosts.title: What To Do When You Lose Your Car Keys in Cardiff
blogPosts.excerpt: Losing your vehicle keys is a panic-inducing moment. Follow these practical steps to regain access without paying exorbitant dealership prices.
blogPosts.htmlContent:
What To Do When You Lose Your Car Keys

We've all been there: you reach into your pocket or bag to grab your car keys, and they simply aren't there. After the frantic retracing of steps, the reality sets in. You've lost your car keys. But before you call an expensive dealership in Cardiff and arrange a tow truck, take a deep breath.

Step 1: Check Your Insurance and Breakdown Cover

First, verify if your standard car insurance policy or your roadside breakdown cover involves "key cover." Many modern policies include reimbursement provisions if you need an auto locksmith to cut you a new key. Do not break a window—this will cost you massively in repairs and is entirely unnecessary.

Step 2: Gather Your Vehicle Information

When you contact a professional, you need to provide specific information so they can guarantee they have the correct diagnostic equipment and blank transponders. Have the following ready:

  • The Make, Model, and Year of the vehicle
  • The Vehicle Registration Number (License Plate)
  • The Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) – usually visible on the dashboard through the windshield
  • Proof of ownership (V5C logbook or insurance documents)

Step 3: Call an Auto Locksmith, Not the Main Dealer

If you call a main dealership, you will inevitably have to pay to get the car towed to their garage. Furthermore, you will often wait days or even weeks for replacement keys to be shipped from a manufacturer warehouse in Europe.

A professional Auto Locksmith operates from a mobile workshop. We drive to your location, pick the door locks damage-free, decode the mechanical cuts, provide a new physical key, and program the complex transponder directly to your vehicle's ECU on the roadside. The process usually takes less than an hour, and old, lost keys can be completely erased from the vehicle's memory so they can never be used to steal your car.

blogPosts.title: The Hidden Benefits of Key Remapping for Your Vehicle
blogPosts.excerpt: Discover how professional key remapping can secure your vehicle and protect you from stolen keys across Cardiff.
blogPosts.htmlContent:
The Hidden Benefits of Key Remapping for Your Vehicle

Key remapping, often known as transponder programming, involves modifying the software on your vehicle's immobilizer to recognize only your current keys. But why is this so critical, and what benefits can key remapping offer drivers in Cardiff?

Why Remap Your Keys?

When buying a used vehicle, you can never be certain how many spare keys the previous owner had cut. A professional key remapper safely erases all old, lost, or unaccounted-for keys from your car's memory, ensuring that only the keys in your physical possession can start the engine.

Increased Security and Peace of Mind

The most immediate and noticeable benefit of a key remap is the significant increase in vehicle security. You will experience complete peace of mind knowing that if an old set of keys was lost or stolen, it is now utterly useless to a potential thief. This is especially beneficial for high-value vehicles.

Dealership Level Service at Your Door

Interestingly, key remapping isn't something that has to be done at an expensive main dealer. Auto locksmiths are equipped with the exact same diagnostic equipment and dealer-level software. This means the engine immobilizer can be recoded right on your driveway. For busy commuters across Cardiff, the resulting convenience can quickly offset the cost of the remap itself.

Interested in securing your car's true potential? Discover our Vehicle Key Remapping service today.

_backupServices.title: Emergency 24/7 Lockout
_backupServices.summary: Rapid-response non-destructive entry for homes, businesses, and vehicles.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Immediate Assistance When You're Locked Out

Being locked out of your home, office, or vehicle is incredibly stressful.

It always happens at the worst possible time.

Our emergency lockout service is designed to solve your access problems quickly, safely, and without unnecessary costs.

Our Non-Destructive Approach

Unlike some operators who immediately reach for the drill, our highly trained technicians specialize in non-destructive entry methods.

By using advanced lock-picking tools and bypass techniques, we can often open your door without damaging the lock itself.

This means your existing keys will still work, saving you the expense of a replacement cylinder.

When Might We Need to Change a Lock?

While we aim to pick every lock, modern high-security locks (like 3-Star TS007 cylinders) are specifically designed to resist picking and snapping.

If we have to bypass these high-security mechanisms, we may need to replace the lock.

However, we will always explain the situation and agree on pricing before undertaking any destructive entry.

Fast Response Times

  • Local Dispatch: Our vans are stationed locally to ensure we can reach you within 30-45 minutes on average.
  • 24/7 Availability: We do not charge inflated premium rates just because you call at 2 AM.
  • Fully Stocked: Should your lock need replacing, our vans carry a wide array of British Standard locks, so we manage the situation in a single visit.

If you are currently locked out, do not wait.

Click here to call our emergency dispatch team immediately.

_backupServices.title: Lock Replacement & Upgrades
_backupServices.summary: High-security anti-snap locks and deadbolts installed to British Standards.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Upgrade Your Security with British Standard Locks

Many homeowners are unaware that the locks securing their front and back doors run the risk of failing modern security standards.

"Lock snapping" is a common method used by intruders to break into homes with UPVC or composite doors in under 15 seconds.

Our UPVC Door specialists can replace your vulnerable cylinders with high-security alternatives.

Why Upgrade?

A lock replacement is highly recommended when:

  • You have just moved into a new property and don't know who has spare keys
  • Your current locks are sticking, jamming, or difficult to turn
  • You want to upgrade to Insurance-Approved BS3621 mortice deadlocks or TS007 3-Star cylinders
  • You have recently lost your keys or suspect a set has been stolen

Our Installation Standards

Our locksmiths exclusively install trusted, high-security brands.

Every residential lock replacement is guaranteed to meet or exceed the requirements of standard home insurance policies.

By upgrading, we ensure that your property is protected against snapping, bumping, picking, and drilling.


Ready to upgrade your home defense?

Reach out to schedule a free home security assessment.

_backupServices.title: UPVC Door & Window Locks
_backupServices.summary: Specialist repair and replacement of multipoint UPVC locking mechanisms.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Expert UPVC Door & Window Solutions

UPVC and composite doors provide excellent insulation and security.

However, their internal mechanisms (multipoint locks) are complex and prone to wear over time.

If your door handle is floppy, stiff, or entirely jammed, you need a specialist.

Common UPVC Problems We Fix

  • Jammed Mechanisms: The door is stuck shut and the handle won't lift. We can open the door without damaging the frame and replace the broken gearbox.
  • Floppy Handles: The handle drops down when released, indicating a broken internal spring cassette or mechanism failure.
  • Door Alignment Issues: The door drops on its hinges, making it difficult to lock. We can re-align the door by toe-and-heeling the glass panels or adjusting the flag hinges, preventing future mechanism damage.

Cost-Effective Repairs

Many customers believe they need a whole new door when the multipoint lock fails. This is rarely the case.

We carry dozens of different gearboxes and central mechanisms to repair your existing door quickly.

This provides a solution at a fraction of the cost of a replacement door.


Do you need to secure a new window locking handle or upgrade your euro cylinders?

We do that too! Check out our Lock Replacement & Upgrades service for more info.

_backupServices.title: Commercial Access Control
_backupServices.summary: Master key systems, digital locks, and high-security business installations.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Protecting Your Business and Assets

Securing a commercial premises requires a significantly different approach than a residential property.

You must balance high-level security with ease of access for employees, fire safety regulations, and key control.

Our Commercial Access team specializes in tailoring solutions for offices, retail stores, and industrial sites.

Master Key Suites

Managing dozens of keys across different departments is inefficient and risky. We design and install comprehensive Master Key systems where:

  • Staff members receive a single key that only opens their authorized doors.
  • Managers receive a sub-master key for their department.
  • The business owner holds a Grand Master key that opens every door in the building.

Digital & Smart Access Control

Move away from physical keys entirely.

We install mechanical push-button locks, electronic keypad entry, and advanced smart-card / fob systems.

If an employee leaves, you don't need to change the locks—simply revoke their fob's access from the central portal.


Protecting your commercial premises also means dealing with emergencies swiftly.

Our Burglary Repairs team is available 24/7 if your business has suffered a break-in.

_backupServices.title: Mobile Key Cutting
_backupServices.summary: Precision key duplication on-site for mortice, cylinder, and high-security keys.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Precision Mobile Key Cutting

Don't waste time traveling to a high street kiosk only to find the duplicated key doesn't work.

Our fleet of vans is equipped with state-of-the-art key cutting machinery calibrated to duplicate a massive variety of keys flawlessly at your location.

Types of Keys We Cut

  • Standard cylinder keys (Yale-style) and UPVC door keys
  • Traditional mortice and deadlock keys
  • High-security dimple keys and restricted profile keys
  • Window lock keys, padlock keys, and postbox keys

Guaranteed to Work

The major advantage of mobile key cutting is that we test the newly cut key in your lock immediately.

If it needs a microscopic adjustment to turn smoothly, we make it right then and there.

High street shops cannot test the lock, leading to frustrating return trips.


If you're upgrading your security, we can cut extra keys on the spot during our Lock Replacement service.

_backupServices.title: Burglary Repairs & Boarding
_backupServices.summary: Immediate post-break-in securing, boarding up, and lock replacement.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Emergency Break-In Response

Experiencing a break-in is traumatic and leaves you feeling incredibly vulnerable.

Our priority in these situations is responding immediately, securing your property, and restoring your peace of mind so you can focus on the recovery process.

Securing the Premises

If doors, frames, or windows have been severely damaged to gain entry, we will make the property watertight and physically secure right away.

If the damage is too extensive to immediately refit a door, we provide heavy-duty boarding up services to secure the structure overnight.

Comprehensive Repairs and Upgrades

  • Lock Changes: We immediately change all affected locks, prioritizing high-security anti-snap cylinders to aggressively deter repeat attempts.
  • Mechanism Repairs: Intruders often badly damage the internal UPVC gearboxes. We carry stock to replace these on the spot.
  • Frame Reinforcement: If the wooden frame has been splintered, we can supply and fit London bars and Birmingham bars to reinforce the structural integrity of the frame.

If you have just suffered a break-in, make sure to notify the authorities.

Once you are safe, we will dispatch an emergency technician immediately.


Consider our Lock Upgrade services to ensure your property meets modern security standards against future attacks.

_backupServices.summary: Vehicle entry, transponder key programming, and broken key extraction.

_backupServices.title: Burglary Repairs
_backupServices.summary: Immediate post-break-in securing, mechanism repairs, and lock replacement.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Emergency Burglary Repairs & Lock Upgrades

Experiencing a break-in is traumatic and leaves you feeling incredibly vulnerable.

Our priority in these situations is responding immediately, repairing the damage to your locks, and restoring your peace of mind so you can focus on the recovery process.

Securing the Premises

We will repair damaged lock housings, replace snapped cylinders, and ensure your doors and windows lock securely once again.

Comprehensive Lock Upgrades

  • Lock Changes: We immediately change all affected locks, prioritizing high-security anti-snap cylinders to aggressively deter repeat attempts.
  • Mechanism Repairs: Intruders often badly damage the internal UPVC gearboxes. We carry stock to replace these on the spot.
  • Frame Reinforcement: If the wooden frame has been splintered, we can supply and fit London bars and Birmingham bars to reinforce the structural integrity of the frame.

If you have just suffered a break-in, make sure to notify the authorities.

Consider our Lock Upgrade services to ensure your property meets modern security standards against future attacks.

_backupServices.title: UPVC Repairs
_backupServices.summary: Expert realignment and repair of sticking UPVC doors, floppy handles, and drafty windows.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Expert UPVC Door & Window Repairs

If your UPVC or composite door is difficult to lock, dropping on its hinges, or has a floppy handle, it needs professional attention fast.

Ignoring these warning signs often leads to the internal mechanism failing completely, leaving you locked out or unable to secure your property.

Common UPVC Faults We Fix

  • Door Alignment & Hinge Adjustments: We stop the door from dragging on the frame and make locking smooth again.
  • Floppy Handles: We replace broken internal spring cassettes so your handles don't sag.
  • Sticking Barrels: We lubricate or replace cylinders where the key won't turn smoothly.
  • Drafty Windows: We fix broken window restrictors, friction stays, and window locks.

We carry specialized UPVC repair tools and hardware to fix your door on the spot, saving you the immense cost of replacing the entire door.


Need to upgrade your locks while we're there? Check out our Lock Replacement service.

_backupServices.title: Multipoint Lock Mechanisms
_backupServices.summary: Replacement of broken gearboxes and full multipoint locking strips for UPVC doors.
_backupServices.htmlContent:
Multipoint Lock & Gearbox Replacement

The multipoint lock is the long strip of metal running down the edge of your UPVC or composite door that features multiple hooks and bolts.

When this complex mechanism breaks down, the door handle will often spin freely, or you will be unable to lift the handle to engage the locks.

Cost-Effective Gearbox Replacements

Often, you don't need to replace the entire strip. Our specialists can identify the specific failing center case (the gearbox) and replace just that part.

We stock dozens of different mechanisms from leading brands like Yale, ERA, Maco, GU, and Winkhaus, ensuring we can fix the issue in a single visit.

Non-Destructive Door Opening

If your multipoint lock has failed while the door is closed and locked, do not panic and do not force the handle.

We use specialized spreaders and bypass tools to open the door safely without damaging the UPVC frame or the door itself.
